[done] T1c ERNIE captured-verbatim envelope WINNER. warning_visible=true, Korean warning text rendered in chat UI with triangle icon. Key: baidu parser requires field-VALUES matching mid-stream snapshot (state=generating-resp + endTurn=false + isFinished=false) not final-state. DevTools EventStream 0 rows despite client render — baidu uses tolerant parser.
